# Pet-store robots policy.
#
# Allow crawl of the storefront, block transactional + auth paths
# from search results. Sitemap is regenerated by
# scripts/generate-sitemap.ts.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /account
Disallow: /addresses
Disallow: /orders
Disallow: /orders/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /buddy/

Sitemap: https://stacks.localhost/sitemap.xml
